questionHtml: Suggest how entanglement in plastics can lead to the death of marine birds.
markschemeHtml:
a. birds are unable to fly/swim for food;

b. unable to escape predators;

c. birds drown;

d. birds suffocate / are strangled;

meta.title: Suggest how entanglement in plastics can lead to the death of marine birds.
breadcrumbLabels: D4.2.10. Effects of microplastic and macroplastic pollution of the oceans
